page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.8xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance powered by the custom ARM64-based Alibaba Yitian 710 processor. The instance features 32 dedicated physical cores running at a clock speed of 2.75 GHz, with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio that eliminates simultaneous multithreading overhead. It is equipped with 256 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core. The processor includes 64 KB of L1 data cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 64 MB of L3 cache, alongside hardware-accelerated AES cryptography. This instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the ecs.r8y.8xlarge demonstrates strong performance in memory-intensive and multi-threaded operations. It achieves a strong Passmark memory score of 2905.68 and performs exceptionally well in multi-threaded Bzip3 decompression, reaching 277.26 GB/sec. Database operations are also highly efficient, with a Passmark database score of 23860.1. Standard CPU benchmarks, such as stress-ng, yield average multi-core performance of 57723.26, while Redis SET operations sustain 48.91 million operations per second. Large-block memory bandwidth reads and writes reach 97.38 GB/sec and 48.04 GB/sec respectively, indicating solid throughput for data-heavy tasks.

The custom Yitian 710 ARM64 architecture provides a highly resource-dense and cost-efficient alternative to traditional x86 hardware profiles, offering competitive memory bandwidth and processing capabilities per resource unit. However, the lack of local NVMe storage requires reliance on network-attached storage, which may introduce latency tradeoffs for I/O-heavy workloads. This instance is highly suited for memory-intensive workloads, including large-scale database operations, multi-threaded data decompression, caching layers like Redis, and medium-scale LLM inference tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.8xlarge is a memory-optimized, ARM64-based instance powered by a 32-core Alibaba Yitian 710 processor running at 2.75 GHz. It features 256 GB of RAM, providing a high 8 GB per core ratio, and operates on a KVM hypervisor with 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark data highlights strong performance in memory-bound and multi-threaded tasks, including a high Passmark memory score and efficient database operations, alongside average multi-core CPU performance. The custom ARM architecture offers qualitative resource density and cost efficiency compared to traditional x86 platforms. This instance is well-suited for memory-intensive applications, database hosting, multi-threaded data processing, and Redis caching layers.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.8xlarge is an ARM64 memory-optimized instance with a 32-core Yitian 710 CPU, 256 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network speed, delivering strong performance for databases and multi-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.8xlarge is an ARM64 memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated Yitian 710 cores, 256 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: An ARM64-powered, memory-optimized instance delivering high memory bandwidth and dedicated core performance for database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 32-core Alibaba Yitian 710 ARM64 processor at 2.75 GHz
Equipped with 256 GB of RAM, offering a high 8 GB per core ratio
Delivers strong performance in database operations and memory benchmarks
Features 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor
Optimized for memory-intensive databases, caching, and data processing
